title: In defense of radical naivete
speakers: Archie Lee Coates IV (Co-Founder, PLAYLAB, INC.), Damien Correll (VP, Brand Studio, Figma)
key_points: A fireside conversation between Figma's VP of Brand Design & Creative, Damien Correll, and PlayLab co-founder Archie Lee Coates IV exploring 'radical naivete' as a creative practice: questioning assumptions, challenging conventions, and approaching familiar problems with fresh eyes.
Draws on PlayLab's work across brands, institutions, and cultural experiences to illustrate how crossing disciplines and starting from first principles can produce unexpected breakthroughs.
Frames these ideas as especially relevant for today's leaders, who are navigating new problems and paradigms without established playbooks.
